docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIBEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTORIA THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED THE DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIBEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:NONE) SERVED JAN-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTORIA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIBEL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTORIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2010 - CONTINUED TO APR-02-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES MEDIATED - NO RESOLUTION - RAN OUT OF TIME - EACH PARTY NEEDS TO HAVE AN INTERPRETER. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARTA RIESEN PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
